attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IFACE)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ASN_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.MESSAGE_3B2_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.CONTAINER_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.PO_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.INVENTORY_ITEM_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.PO_RELEASE_LINE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.SHIPPED_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.UOM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.SERIAL_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ASN_PROCESSED_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ASN_PROCESSED_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.SERIAL_NUM_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE_CONTEXT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.LPN_PROCESS_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.LPN_PROCESS_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.LINE_PROCESS_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF,
 (
 select ASN_LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF
 minus
 select ASN_LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ASN_LINE_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.ASN_LINE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_ASNLINE_IB_IF.REFRESH_DATETIME
